title: The Hive Herald
tagline: Dispatches from the Post Fiat colony — on-chain intelligence, daily

lead.headline: Memo velocity climbed to 148 (vs 133 avg).
lead.why_it_matters: Rising memo throughput signals task activity picking up. Contributors may find more reward opportunities in the next window.

PULSE.name: Pulse
PULSE.methodology_note: Health score copied from the hourly health.json surface. Wallet counts and memo velocity derived from the chain-index snapshot taken at as_of.
PULSE.narrative: Health: 0.6325 (B). 924 wallets, 183 contributors. 148 memos today vs 133 avg. Velocity rising.

FLOW.name: Flow of Capital
FLOW.tagline: Where PFT moved in the last 24 hours
FLOW.methodology_note: Reward payments counted from distribution/airdrop/task-node wallets to any non-bot, non-infrastructure address within a 24h rolling window. Top earner selected by aggregate PFT received in the window.
FLOW.narrative: 64 reward payments, 434279 PFT distributed to 30 contributors. Top earner: rs5gTo...VF97 (58928 PFT).

preview.headline: 64 reward payments distributed 434,279 PFT in the last 24h

MOVERS.name: Who Stirs the Hive
MOVERS.tagline: Rising contributors, new arrivals, gone-quiet alerts
MOVERS.methodology_note: Most-active ranked by memo count in the last 7 days. New wallets are those whose earliest indexed activity is within the 7-day window. Gone-quiet flags contributors with prior memo_tx_count >= 5 whose last activity is older than the gone_quiet threshold.
MOVERS.narrative: Most active (7d): rs5gTo...VF97 (69 memos). Fastest new contributor: rMA69k...rcQK (18.0 memos/day in 1 days). 25 new wallet(s) this week. 31 contributor(s) went quiet (7+ days silent).

preview.headline: 5 new wallets, 5 went quiet this week

WATCH.name: Sybil Watch
WATCH.methodology_note: new_sybil_detections_24h counts DISTINCT wallets newly entered into the sybil_clusters table within the last 24 hours. This is NOT a count of reclassifications — it's new cluster memberships assigned by the deterministic classifier.
WATCH.detection_basis: deterministic behavioral classifier v2.0 (zero_memo + ~15 PFT reserve + peer density)
WATCH.classification_scope: wallets indexed through the Lens chain crawler + expanded deep-crawl set
WATCH.enforcement_state_reason: No direct infrastructure→bot transactions detected in the 24h window (Q2 from CASE-001)
WATCH.narrative: 743 sybil accounts tracked across 1 cluster(s). Bot ratio: 79.3%. 1 wallet(s) in review queue. Enforcement: active. Zero reward leaks.

preview.headline: 0 new sybil detections, bot ratio at 79.3%

DEEP_CUT.name: From the Archive Vault
DEEP_CUT.tagline: Full-history exclusive insights only we can produce
DEEP_CUT.methodology_note: Deep cut draws on the full-history archive node's complete ledger range. Each edition surfaces a different historical pattern — 'this day in PFT history', busiest-hour-ever, first indexed tx, etc. The specific type rotates.
DEEP_CUT.data_source_requirement: full-history postfiatd archive node (only Permanent Upper Class runs one on the network)
DEEP_CUT.narrative: 30 days ago (2026-04-11): 7998 transactions from 82 wallets. Busiest hour ever: 2026-03-02T19:00 UTC (183 memos). First indexed transaction: 2026-02-06 from r4vhrM...7bmA

preview.headline: Full-history archive reveals a historical pattern inside the network

delivery_channels: on-chain memo from SUBS bot r9XYDxJDbmmhSGNpUguVhea6xn3Tu2HbeF (daily push to subscribers)
downstream_contract.positioning: The canonical public edition contract for a subscription-native intelligence product: machine-readable, archiveable, tier-aware, downstream-stable, and auditable against live indexed network data.

integrity.determinism_note: Edition generated from indexed public data and published analytics surfaces without manual overrides. Same chain index + same hourly crawl produces the same payload.
